title: Forever a Child in Our Eyes

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
A-are you tired, Father? You only got back
yesterday... Are you really okay to go out today?

text_block_list.name: Rice's Father
text_block_list.text:
I'm in tip-top shape! In fact, I'm so excited that I
can't sit still. Thank you for planning out our
schedule for today, Rice.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing! I know it's not exactly the day of, but
celebrating your wedding anniversary is
important!

text_block_list.name: Rice's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Shall we be off, then? I can't even recall
the last time I visited an art gallery.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? No way! That gust of wind snatched the
tickets out of my hands!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: W-wait for me here! I'll get them back right away!

text_block_list.name: Rice's Father
text_block_list.text: Ah! Let's hurry after her, dear! We don't want things to end up like that time...

text_block_list.name: Rice's Father
text_block_list.text:
Rice! I'll get your hat, so come down from that
tree right away!

text_block_list.name: Young Rice
text_block_list.text:
It's okay... I can... get it! It was my fault for not
wearing it properly...

text_block_list.name: Young Rice
text_block_list.text: Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Rice's Mother
text_block_list.text: Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice's Mother
text_block_list.text:
You're right. We can't let her put herself in
danger again! Let's go, darling!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm sure that they got blown in this direction...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Brrring! Brrring!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It's my phone... Um, hello?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? The chef came down with a sudden
illness?! My reservation must be canceled? Yes...
Yes, I understand...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what should I do... At this rate, we won't be
able to go to the gallery or the restaurant...

text_block_list.name: Rice's Mother
text_block_list.text: Rice! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry! Not only did I lose our art gallery
tickets, but our dinner reservation got canceled
too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This is all my fault... I've ruined your wedding
anniversary!

text_block_list.name: Rice's Father
text_block_list.text: Nonsense, dear! This day is still far from over!

text_block_list.name: Rice's Mother
text_block_list.text:
We can just buy replacement tickets. We can
search for another restaurant together too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
N-no! I don't want to make you go through so
much trouble for your own celebration!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This is all my fault, so I'm the one who needs to
fix it! You two should—

text_block_list.name: Rice's Father
text_block_list.text:
...It's okay to rely on us, Rice. We'd be more than
happy to help you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
(I ended up needing their help after all... I guess I
really am useless...)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
(I'll have to make this up to them and make sure
they get the proper celebration they deserve!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I head to my office, I spot Rice Shower with a
serious expression on her face.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I got it. Make sure you add that to your
calendar, Father!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'll get it right this time and make it a special day
for them... I need to start preparing!
